name: User pays a single payment with no transfer and one stamp on nodoInviaRPT that exists already in GPD
fullName: User pays a single payment from existing payment position via nodoInviaRPT: User pays a single payment with no transfer and one stamp on nodoInviaRPT that exists already in GPD
